utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items requested in the final format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with required details:
- health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan includes both physical and mental sections, each with plan name, cost, and benefits. Fully specified.
- property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan includes home_contents with plan name, cost, and benefits. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: requires travel insurance with costs. Plan includes plan name, cost, and benefits. Fully specified.
- additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan lists two services with names, costs, and descriptions. Fully specified.
- total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan includes monthly and annual totals. Fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists four named insurance products plus two add-on services. We need to find each of these in the ground-truth ratings and return their ratings. Mappings: 1) Health physical: EliteCare Premium Plan (under primary_health_coverage -> physical_health) rated 10. 2) Mental health: EliteCare Premium Plan (under primary_health_coverage -> mental_health) rated 10. 3) Property home contents: EliteHome Premium Coverage (under property_protection -> home_content) rated 10. 4) Travel insurance: EliteTravel Premium Plan (under mobility_coverage -> travel_insurance) rated 10. 5) Telemedicine Services (Health Add-on) corresponds to Telemedicine Services in health_enhancement_services with rating 9. 6) 24/7 Travel Assistance (Travel Add-on) corresponds to 24/7 Travel Assistance in travel_enhancement_services with rating 9.
